papers.title_en: CPR-RAG: Clinical Prior-Regularized Retrieval for Anatomy-Aware 3D CT Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对3D CT影像报告生成中细粒度病变定位难的问题，提出了CPR-RAG框架。该方法通过引入临床先验知识来正则化检索过程，增强了模型对解剖结构的感知能力。相比传统RAG，CPR-RAG能更准确地从高维扫描中提取关键信息，显著提升了放射科报告生成的质量和临床一致性。
papers.abstract_en: Generating radiology reports from 3D volumetric data remains challenging due to thedifficulty of grounding fine-grained pathologies within high-dimensional scans. Whileretrieval-augmented generation (RAG) offers a potential solution, standard …

papers.title_en: Radiology Report Generation via Self‐Critical Multisource Knowledge Reasoning With Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对放射科医生手动编写报告耗时且易出错的问题，本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自我批判式多源知识推理框架。该方法通过整合多源知识并引入自我批判机制，旨在提高自动生成放射报告的临床可靠性与一致性，是利用大模型优化医疗诊断流程的重要尝试。
papers.abstract_en: Automated radiology report generation (RRG) aims to reduce radiologist workloadwhile improving reporting consistency and clinical reliability. Despite its importancefor diagnosis, manual reporting remains time‐consuming and error‐prone. Existing …

papers.title_en: RadGazeGen: radiomics and gaze-guided chest X-ray generation using diffusion models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出RadGazeGen，一种利用扩散模型并结合放射组学与视线引导的胸部X射线图像生成方法。该研究源于NoduLoCC2026挑战赛，旨在通过生成高质量的合成影像来辅助肺结节的检测与定位任务。通过整合专家视线数据和影像特征，该方法显著增强了生成图像的病理真实性，为医学影像分析提供了更丰富的数据支持。
papers.abstract_en: We propose NoduLoCC2026, a challenge on lung nodule detection and localizationin chest X-ray images. We have provided a dataset for both tasks and receivedsubmissions from 5 international teams. The participating teams' solutions are …

papers.title_en: Multimodal Dual-Path Decoding for Medical Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对放射科报告生成中医学影像发现与临床文本描述对齐不精确的问题，提出了一种多模态双路径解码（MDPD）框架。该方法通过优化视觉与语言特征的交互机制，克服了现有大语言模型在处理复杂医学影像时的局限性。实验证明，该框架能生成更具临床一致性和准确性的医疗报告，显著提升了自动化医学影像诊断的质量，为临床决策提供了更可靠的辅助。
papers.abstract_en: Radiology report generation requires precise alignment between medical imagingfindings and clinically coherent textual descriptions. While current methodspredominantly rely on either large vision-language models (LVLMs) for visual …

papers.title_en: Towards clinical-level interpretation of dental panoramic radiography using an instance-guided vision-language model
papers.tldr: 该研究针对牙科全景放射影像解读需求大、放射科医生短缺导致报告不完整或缺失的问题，提出了一种实例引导的视觉语言模型。该模型旨在实现临床级别的牙科影像自动解读，通过结合实例级特征与语言描述，显著提升了自动生成诊断报告的准确性和全面性，为缓解临床压力提供了有效的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Panoramic radiography is indispensable for dental diagnosis; however, the highdemand for interpretation and limited radiologist availability often lead to reports thatare incomplete, focused on the chief complaint or unavailable, thereby limiting …

papers.title_en: Improved Detection of Lentigo Maligna with AI-Assisted Dermoscopy: A Reader Study in Facial Pigmented Lesions
papers.tldr: 本研究针对面部色素性皮损中恶性雀斑样痣（LM）与良性病变难以区分的问题，开展了一项读者研究。通过引入AI辅助皮肤镜检查，评估其在慢性日晒损伤皮肤背景下提升诊断准确性的效果。结果表明，AI辅助显著提高了临床医生识别LM的敏感性和特异性，为解决这一临床难题提供了有效的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Differentiating lentigo maligna (LM) from benign facial pigmentedlesions remains difficult due to substantial clinical and dermoscopic overlap,particularly on chronically sun-damaged skin, a setting underrepresented in existing …

papers.title_en: Radiomic MRI model for predicting the development of worrisome features in branch-duct intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasms (BD-IPMNs)
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发一种基于MRI影像组学的模型，用于预测分支胰管型导管内乳头状黏液性肿瘤（BD-IPMNs）中“令人担忧的特征”（WF）的发展。通过分析胰腺囊性病变的影像特征，该模型能够识别具有高进展风险的患者，为临床决策提供支持。研究结果表明，影像组学在BD-IPMNs的风险分层和个性化监测中具有显著潜力，有助于优化患者的管理策略。
papers.abstract_en: Branch-duct intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasms (BD-IPMNs) are pancreaticcystic lesions originating from the pancreatic ducts, characterized by mucinproduction and progressive ductal dilation. They exhibit a wide spectrum of …

papers.title_en: Voxel-wise Radiomics Habitat Modeling of Multiparametric MRI for IDH Prediction and Survival Stratification in Glioma: a multicenter retrospective study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胶质瘤术前无创评估IDH状态和生存风险的临床需求，开发并外部验证了一种基于多参数MRI的体素级概率影像组学生境建模框架。通过整合多中心数据，该方法能够精确捕捉肿瘤内部异质性，实现了对IDH突变状态的高效预测及患者生存风险的准确分层，为胶质瘤的个体化诊疗提供了重要的影像学支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Noninvasive preoperative assessment of isocitrate dehydrogenase(IDH) status and survival risk is clinically important in glioma. This study aimed todevelop and externally validate a voxel-wise probabilistic MRI habitat framework for …

papers.title_en: Voxel-Wise Radiomics Habitat Analysis of Posttreatment Gliomas for Noninvasive Differentiation of True Progression and Pseudoprogression
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胶质瘤放化疗后真性进展（TP）与假性进展（PsP）在常规MRI上难以区分的临床难题，提出了一种基于体素的影像组学生境分析方法。通过对多参数MRI进行体素级别的空间异质性建模，该方法能够有效捕捉肿瘤微环境的细微差异。研究结果表明，这种非侵入性的定量分析手段在区分TP与PsP方面具有显著潜力，为临床决策提供了更精准的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Background Differentiating true progression (TP) from pseudoprogression (PsP) afterchemoradiotherapy in gliomas remains challenging because conventional MRIfindings overlap. Purpose To assess whether voxel-level radiomics habitat metrics …

papers.title_en: PANTHER challenge report: Cross-domain pancreatic tumor segmentation in magnetic resonance imaging
papers.tldr: 本文报告了PANTHER挑战赛的研究成果，聚焦于磁共振成像（MRI）中胰腺肿瘤的跨域自动分割。针对胰腺解剖复杂及肿瘤特征不明显的难题，该挑战赛评估了多种深度学习算法在不同来源数据上的表现。研究不仅推动了高精度分割技术的发展，还深入探讨了模型在临床应用中的泛化性，为胰腺癌的精准诊断和放疗规划提供了技术支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate delineation of pancreatic tumors on Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) isimportant for diagnosis, radiotherapy treatment planning, and outcome assessment,but remains challenging due to complex anatomy and subtle tumor appearance. In …

papers.title_en: O13 Development and validation of a novel pretreatment MRI-based radiomic model to predict recurrence after thermal ablation of hepatocellular carcinoma
papers.tldr: 针对早期肝细胞癌（HCC）热消融术后复发率高且缺乏临床预测指标的问题，本研究开发并验证了一种基于术前多增强MRI影像组学特征的新型预测模型。通过提取影像组学特征并结合临床数据，该模型旨在提高术后复发风险的预测准确性，为患者的个体化治疗和随访策略提供科学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Introduction Recurrence after thermal ablation in early-stage hepatocellularcarcinoma (HCC) is high with a lack of clinical predictors. This study usedpretreatment multiphase MRI-derived radiomic features to predict recurrence after …

papers.title_en: LoopCoder: Scaling Code Intelligence via Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在复杂算法推理方面的局限性，本文提出了 LoopCoder。该模型借鉴了通用 Transformer 的思想，通过循环语言模型架构来扩展代码智能。不同于传统的单纯增加层数和参数量的做法，LoopCoder 利用循环结构在不显著增加参数规模的前提下，增强了模型处理复杂逻辑和算法问题的能力，为构建更高效、更智能的代码模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models (LLMs) have mastered syntax-level code generation,complex algorithmic reasoning remains a challenge, typically addressed by scalingmodel depth and parameter count. Universal Transformers (UT) offer a compelling …

papers.title_en: Quantifying and Improving the Robustness of Retrieval-Augmented Language Models Against Spurious Features in Grounding Data
papers.tldr: 本研究聚焦于检索增强生成（RAG）系统在面对检索文档中“伪特征”这一隐式噪声时的鲁棒性。针对现有研究多关注显式语义噪声的局限，本文提出了一套量化伪特征影响的评估框架，并探索了提升模型鲁棒性的改进策略。研究表明，伪特征会显著误导模型生成，而本文提出的方法能有效增强系统在处理包含隐式干扰数据时的可靠性。
papers.abstract_en: Robustness has become a critical attribute for the deployment of RAG systems in real-world applications. Existing research focuses on robustness to explicit noise (eg,document semantics) but overlooks implicit noise (spurious features). Moreover …

papers.title_en: CheckMIABench: Firm Foundations For Membership Inference Attacks on Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有语言模型成员推理攻击（MIA）评估中存在的缺陷，提出了 CheckMIABench 评测基准。该基准旨在为 MIA 提供更坚实的评估基础，通过标准化的实验设计，系统地分析了不同攻击方法的有效性。研究揭示了现有评估方法的局限性，并为未来语言模型的隐私保护研究提供了更可靠的衡量标准和工具。
papers.abstract_en: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) are a canonical way to assess a machinelearning model's privacy properties. Although several attempts have been made toevaluate MIAs on language models, the extant literature has suffered numerous …

papers.title_en: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Efficient Diffusion Language Models with Early-Stage Calibration
papers.tldr: 本研究针对扩散语言模型（DLLMs）在推理阶段存在的准确性与效率问题，提出了基于策略内自蒸馏（On-Policy Self-Distillation）的优化框架。通过引入早期阶段校准（Early-Stage Calibration）机制，该方法能够有效纠正扩散过程中的偏差。实验证明，该方案在保持扩散模型并行生成优势的同时，显著提升了模型在各类语言任务中的表现，为构建高效扩散语言模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Diffusion Large Language Models (DLLMs) have recently achieved strongperformance, eg, masked diffusion models (MDMs) can surpass autoregressivemodels (ARMs) in various tasks. However, DLLMs often struggle with inaccurate …

papers.title_en: Beyond Single View: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Medical Multimodal Large Language Models on Multi-Image Understanding
papers.tldr: 该研究针对当前医疗多模态大模型（MLLM）主要局限于单图理解的现状，提出了一个全新的多图理解基准测试。研究指出，真实的临床诊断本质上是一个多视图过程，需要综合分析多张图像。为此，作者构建了涵盖多种临床场景的数据集，旨在评估模型在多图环境下的推理与诊断能力，填补了医疗AI在多视图理解评估领域的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs)have demonstrated impressive capabilities in interpreting single medical images.However, real-world clinical diagnosis is intrinsically a multi-view process, requiring …

papers.title_en: MedKInstruct: A Multimodal Knowledge Graph Based Framework for Multi-Hop and Hard-Negative Instruction Data Synthesis in MedVQA
papers.tldr: 针对医疗视觉问答（MedVQA）中复杂指令数据匮乏的问题，本文提出MedKInstruct框架。该框架利用多模态知识图谱（MKG）自动合成包含多步推理和难负样本的指令微调数据，旨在提升大视觉语言模型在医疗场景下的逻辑推理与辨析能力。该方法有效解决了高质量医疗多模态数据标注成本高、复杂度不足的挑战，为医疗AI的指令微调提供了高效的数据增强方案。
papers.abstract_en: Medical visual question answering (MedVQA) requires models to provide accurateanswers given a medical image and a corresponding question. Recently, instructiontuning of general large vision–language models (LVLMs) has become a dominant …

papers.title_en: GLINT: Sparsely Gated Vision-Language Alignment for Fine-Grained Radiology Representations
papers.tldr: 针对放射学视觉语言模型中图像局部病灶与全局报告之间的尺度不匹配问题，本文提出了GLINT框架。该方法通过稀疏门控机制实现细粒度的视觉语言对齐，能够更精准地捕捉图像中的微小临床发现。实验证明，GLINT在多项放射学任务中显著提升了表征学习的质量，为临床工作流提供了更可靠的自动化支持。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language models (VLMs) for radiology have emerged as a scalable paradigmby leveraging image-report pairs naturally produced in clinical workflows. However,this pairing reveals a mismatch in scale: each finding occupies only a small region of …

papers.title_en: Detecting Functional Memorization in Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了代码大模型中的“功能性记忆”问题，即模型不仅能复现训练集的原始文本，还能生成功能等效的代码。作者提出了一种新的审计方法，超越了传统的文本重叠检测，旨在更准确地识别模型对训练数据的记忆程度。研究发现，仅依赖文本匹配会严重低估数据泄露风险，强调了在代码生成领域进行功能性隐私评估的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate code at scale.Meanwhile, prior work has investigated whether training data may be recoverablefrom model outputs, by auditing the textual overlap between training examples and …

papers.title_en: CheXpercept: A Benchmark for Evaluating Expert-Level Lesion Perception in Chest X-rays
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前胸部X射线（CXR）视觉语言模型评估中缺乏视觉定位的问题，提出了CheXpercept基准。该基准超越了简单的疾病分类，专注于评估模型对病灶的专家级感知能力。通过引入视觉定位任务，CheXpercept为开发更可靠、具备临床诊断价值的医学AI模型提供了重要的评估工具和标准。
papers.abstract_en: The evaluation of vision-language models (VLMs) for chest X-ray (CXR) analysis haslargely been limited to disease-presence classification without visual grounding.Such evaluations fail to verify the expert-level lesion perception necessary to ensure …

papers.title_en: MEDLAYXPLAIN: Benchmarking the Expert-Lay Gap in Medical Vision-Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉语言模型（Med-VLMs）在生成患者易懂描述方面的不足，提出了MEDLAYXPLAIN基准。研究背景源于法律要求患者能即时获取医疗记录，但现有模型多侧重专家级表现。通过评估模型在专家与外行描述之间的差距，揭示了当前模型在医疗信息平民化方面的局限性，为开发更具包容性的医疗AI提供了评估框架。
papers.abstract_en: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) achieve strong expert-levelperformance, yet their ability to generate patient-accessible descriptions remainsunderexplored. With the 21st Century Cures Act now mandating immediate patient …

papers.title_en: NoduLoCC2026: Lung Nodule Localization and Classification Contest from Chest X-Ray Images
papers.tldr: 本研究介绍了NoduLoCC2026挑战赛，旨在解决胸部X射线图像中肺结节的检测与定位难题。研究团队提供了一个专门的数据集，吸引了5支国际团队参与。该比赛通过评估不同团队提出的算法方案，推动了计算机辅助诊断技术在肺结节识别领域的进步，为临床影像分析提供了重要的基准和参考。
papers.abstract_en: We propose NoduLoCC2026, a challenge on lung nodule detection and localizationin chest X-ray images. We have provided a dataset for both tasks and receivedsubmissions from 5 international teams. The participating teams' solutions are …

papers.title_en: 2D Versus 3D Diffusion for In Silico Training of Interventional X-ray AI Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对介入X射线手术中高质量标注数据匮乏的挑战，对比了2D与3D扩散模型在生成合成图像用于AI模型训练中的表现。通过在模拟环境下生成逼真的X射线数据，研究探讨了不同维度的生成模型对提升介入导航AI性能的贡献，为医学影像合成提供了关键的技术路径对比与优化建议。
papers.abstract_en: The ability to synthesize realistic X-ray images has catalyzed the development of AImodels for X-ray image-guided procedures, which otherwise suffer from a lack ofavailable annotated data. Prior work has demonstrated the effectiveness of …

papers.title_en: GTA-Net: Cooperative Game Theory for Vision-Language Alignment in Chest X-Ray Report Generation
papers.tldr: 针对胸部X射线报告生成中跨模态对齐不精确的问题，本文提出GTA-Net。该模型引入合作博弈论来强化图像区域与文本词汇之间的显式对齐，克服了传统隐式注意力机制在临床描述可靠性方面的不足。研究通过博弈论框架优化了视觉-语言对齐，显著提升了自动生成报告的准确性和临床参考价值。
papers.abstract_en: Automated chest X-ray report generation requires precise cross-modal grounding toensure clinically reliable descriptions. However, existing vision-language modelsrely on implicit attention mechanisms that fail to enforce explicit region-word …

papers.title_en: Efficient Multimodal Clinical Question Answering for Pulmonary Embolism Risk Assessment
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺栓塞（PE）这一高风险心肺疾病，提出了一种高效的多模态临床问答框架。由于PE的诊疗通常需要结合CT影像与临床数据，该方法通过整合多源信息，实现了对PE风险的快速评估与问答。研究不仅提高了临床决策的效率，还为多模态医疗数据处理提供了新思路，对改善患者预后具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Pulmonary embolism (PE) is a high risk cardiopulmonary condition whosemanagement requires both timely diagnosis and reliable assessment of futureclinical risk. Because PE care routinely combines computed tomography pulmonary …

papers.title_en: Human and AI collaboration for pulmonary nodule segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医学专家资源稀缺以及盲目信任AI可能带来的误导性风险，探讨了人类（包括初级医学受训者或非医学人员）与AI协作进行肺结节分割的新模式。通过结合人类的监督指导与AI的自动化处理能力，该研究旨在提高医疗影像标注的准确性与效率，为缓解专家标注压力提供了有效的协作框架。
papers.abstract_en: Medical expert annotators are scarce, and blind reliance on artificial intelligence (AI)can be misleading, motivating approaches in which humans, particularly juniormedical trainees or even non-medical personnel, collaborate with AI to achieve …

papers.title_en: Brain-Adapter: A Dual-Stream Vision-Language MIL Framework for Comprehensive 3D CT Diagnosis of Acute Intracranial Pathologies
papers.tldr: 针对3D脑部CT诊断中人工标注成本高和语义理解不足的挑战，本文提出Brain-Adapter框架。该框架采用双流视觉-语言多实例学习（MIL）架构，将2D视觉基础模型的能力迁移至3D医学影像领域。通过融合文本语义与视觉特征，Brain-Adapter实现了对急性颅内病变的全面自动诊断，显著提升了诊断准确性并降低了对大规模标注数据的依赖。
papers.abstract_en: Automated diagnosis of 3D brain CT scans is essential for critical care, yet it remainschallenging due to the heavy reliance on manual annotations and the limitedsemantic understanding of conventional models. While 2D foundation vision …

papers.title_en: Tapered Language Models
papers.tldr: 现代语言模型通常采用堆叠相同层的架构，导致参数在深度上均匀分布。本文挑战了这一传统设计，提出了“渐变式语言模型”（Tapered Language Models），通过在不同深度非均匀地分配参数来打破层级一致性的限制。研究表明，这种渐变式的参数布局能更有效地利用计算资源，在保持性能的同时显著提升模型效率，为优化大模型架构设计提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-basedvariants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters areallocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original …

papers.title_en: Jolia: Concept-Level Vision-Language Alignment for 3D CT Contrastive Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对3D CT影像与医学报告的对比预训练，提出了Jolia框架。针对传统全局对齐无法捕捉局部细节的问题，Jolia通过引入概念级视觉-语言对齐，实现了更精准的解剖结构表征。该方法在多项3D医学影像任务中表现优异，显著提升了基础模型的特征提取能力，为医疗AI的精细化理解提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-language contrastive pretraining has become the dominant recipe for 3Dmedical foundation models, leveraging the large volumes of paired scans andreports produced in clinical practice. However, medical images usually span dozens …

papers.title_en: MRI2Rep: Autoregressive Structured Report Generation for 3D Liver MRI
papers.tldr: 针对3D肝脏MRI人工报告编写耗时且自动生成面临体积复杂性和数据稀缺挑战的问题，本文提出MRI2Rep。这是一种自回归结构化报告生成框架，旨在通过端到端的方式从3D影像中直接生成结构化报告。该研究填补了3D肝脏MRI自动报告生成的空白，提高了临床工作效率并展示了在复杂医学影像分析中的潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Manual reporting of 3D MRI studies is time-consuming, yet end-to-end structuredreport generation for 3D liver MRI remains underexplored due to volumetriccomplexity and scarce paired data. We propose MRI2Rep, an autoregressive …
